diff --git a/packages/ui/src/engine/pixel-characters.ts b/packages/ui/src/engine/pixel-characters.ts
index 1234567..89abcde 100644
--- a/packages/ui/src/engine/pixel-characters.ts
+++ b/packages/ui/src/engine/pixel-characters.ts
@@ -890,74 +890,234 @@
       drawScribeDesk(ctx, x + 52 * scale, y + 14 * scale, scale);
       break;
    
   }
 }
-
-// ─── Main character draw ───────────────────────────────────────────
- 
-export function drawCharacter(
-  ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,
-  type: CharacterType,
-  state: AnimState,
-  x: number, y: number, s: number, frame: number,
-  agentId?: string,
-  currentJob?: string | null,
-) {
-  const id = agentId ?? `${type}-${Math.round(x)}`;
-  const sprite = SPRITE_MAP[type];
-  const palette = PALETTE_MAP[type];
-  const cs = getCS(id, x, y);
-  const bob = state === 'idle' ? Math.sin(frame * 0.05) * 1.2 : state === 'working' ? Math.sin(frame * 0.1) * 0.8 : 0;
-  const drawY = cs.y + bob;
-  const flipH = cs.dir === 'left';
-
-  // Drop shadow
-  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)';
-  ctx.beginPath();
-  ctx.ellipse(cs.x + 8 * s, drawY + sprite.length * s + 2, 7 * s, 2 * s, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2);
-  ctx.fill();
-
-  drawSpriteDef(ctx, sprite, palette, cs.x, drawY, s, flipH);
-
-  // Walking leg overlay
-  if (cs.moving) {
-    const lp = Math.sin(cs.wf * 0.3) * 2 * s;
-    ctx.fillStyle = palette.B;
-    ctx.fillRect(cs.x + 4 * s, drawY + (sprite.length - 3) * s + lp, 3 * s, 2 * s);
-    ctx.fillRect(cs.x + 9 * s, drawY + (sprite.length - 3) * s - lp, 3 * s, 2 * s);
-  }
-
-  drawStatusEffect(ctx, state, cs.x, drawY, s, frame);
-  if (agentId) {
-    updateBubble(id, state, currentJob ?? null, frame);
-    drawBubble(ctx, id, cs.x + 8 * s, drawY - 4);
-  }
-}
-
-function drawStatusEffect(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, state: AnimState, x: number, y: number, s: number, frame: number) {
-  if (state === 'working') {
-    for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
-      const a = (frame * 0.08 + i * 2.1) % (Math.PI * 2);
-      const sx = x + 8 * s + Math.cos(a) * 12 * s;
-      const sy = y + 10 * s + Math.sin(a) * 8 * s;
-      const sz = (Math.sin(frame * 0.15 + i) * 0.5 + 1) * s;
-      ctx.fillStyle = P.gold[3 + (i % 2)];
-      ctx.fillRect(sx, sy, sz, sz);
-    }
-  } else if (state === 'stalled') {
-    const pulse = Math.sin(frame * 0.12) * 0.25 + 0.25;
-    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(231, 76, 60, ${pulse})`;
-    ctx.fillRect(x - s, y - 2 * s, 18 * s, 24 * s);
-    ctx.fillStyle = '#e74c3c';
-    ctx.font = `bold ${10 * s}px sans-serif`;
-    ctx.fillText('!', x + 14 * s, y + 4 * s);
-  } else if (state === 'reviewing') {
-    ctx.strokeStyle = P.gold[2]; ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
-    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(x + 16 * s, y + 2 * s, 3 * s, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.stroke();
-    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x + 18 * s, y + 4 * s); ctx.lineTo(x + 20 * s, y + 6 * s); ctx.stroke();
-  } else if (state === 'cancelled') {
-    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(50, 50, 60, 0.4)';
-    ctx.fillRect(x - s, y - 2 * s, 18 * s, 24 * s);
+// ─── Pixel art character sprites (16x24) with outlines, shading, and proper proportions ──────────────────────────────
+
+// Palette keys:
+// O = outline (dark)
+// S = skin base, s = shaded skin
+// H = hair base, h = shaded hair
+// P = primary clothing, p = shaded primary
+// C = secondary clothing, c = shaded secondary
+// A = accessory, a = shaded accessory
+// K = cape or cloak, k = shaded cape
+// W = white, w = light gray
+// E = eye color (dark)
+// B = boots or dark leather, b = shaded leather
+// G = gold bright, g = gold dark
+// M = metal bright, m = metal dark
+// R, L, F = red, blue, green accents
+// T, t = parchment or cloth tones
+
+const PIXEL_SCALE = 1; // base scale for 1 pixel
+const CHAR_WIDTH = 16;
+const CHAR_HEIGHT = 24;
+
+// Each character sprite is a 16x24 array of color keys
+
+const SPRITES: Record<CharacterType, string[]> = {
+  king: [
+    '................',
+    '..OOOOOOOOOOOO..',
+    '.OHHHHHHHHHHHHO.',
+    '.OHPPPPPPPPPPHO.',
+    '.OHPPPPPPPPPPhO.',

+    '...OHHHHHHHHO..',
+    '....OOOOOOO....',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+  ],
+  nobility: [
+    '................',
+    '..OOOOOOOOOOOO..',
+    '.OHHHHHHHHHHHHO.',
+    '.OHPPPPPPPPPPhO.',
+    '.OHPPPPPPPPPPhO.',
+    '.OHPPPPPPPPPPhO.',
+    '.OHPPPPPPPPPPhO.',
+    '.OHPPPPPPPPPPhO.',
+    '.OHPPCCCCCPhPhO.',
+    '.OHPPCCCCCPhPhO.',
+    '.OHPPPPPPPPPPhO.',
+    '.OHPPPPPPPPPPhO.',
+    '.OHPPPPPPPPPPhO.',
+    '.OHPPPPPPPPPPhO.',

+    '.OHPPPPPPPPPPhO.',
+    '..OHHHHHHHHHHO.',
+    '...OHHHHHHHHO..',
+    '....OOOOOOO....',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+  ],
+  knight: [
+    '................',
+    '.....MMMMMM.....',
+    '....MMMMMMMM....',
+    '...MMMPPPPMMM...',
+    '...MMMPPPPMMM...',
+    '..MMMPPPPPPMMM..',
+    '..MMMPPPPPPMMM..',
+    '..MMMPGGGPPMMM..',
+    '..MMMPGGGPPMMM..',
+    '..MMMPPPPPPMMM..',
+    '..MMMMPPPPMMM...',
+    '..MMMMMMMMMM....',
+    '...MMMMMMMM.....',
+    '....MMMMMM......',
+    '.....MMMM.......',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+  ],
+  squire: [
+    '................',
+    '.....TTTTTT.....',
+    '....TTTTTTTT....',
+    '...TTTPPPPTTT...',
+    '...TTTPPPPTTT...',
+    '..TTTPPPPPPTTT..',
+    '..TTTPPPPPPTTT..',
+    '..TTTPGGGPTTTT..',
+    '..TTTPGGGPTTTT..',
+    '..TTTPPPPPPTTT..',
+    '..TTTTTPPPTTT...',
+    '..TTTTTTTTTT....',
+    '...TTTTTTTT.....',
+    '....TTTTTT......',
+    '.....TTTT.......',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+  ],
+  healer: [
+    '................',
+    '.....WWWWWW.....',
+    '....WWWWWWWW....',
+    '...WWWPPPPWWW...',
+    '...WWWPPPPWWW...',
+    '..WWWPPPPPPWWW..',
+    '..WWWPPPPPPWWW..',
+    '..WWWGGGGGWWW...',
+    '..WWWGGGGGWWW...',
+    '..WWWPPPPPPWWW..',
+    '..WWWPPPPWWW....',
+    '..WWWWWWWWWW....',
+    '...WWWWWWWW.....',
+    '....WWWWWW......',
+    '.....WWWW.......',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+  ],
+  sentinel: [
+    '................',
+    '.....BBBBBB.....',
+    '....BBBBBBBB....',
+    '...BBBPPPPBBB...',
+    '...BBBPPPPBBB...',
+    '..BBBPPPPPPBBB..',
+    '..BBBPPPPPPBBB..',
+    '..BBBGGGGGBBB...',
+    '..BBBGGGGGBBB...',
+    '..BBBPPPPPPBBB..',
+    '..BBBPPPPBBB....',
+    '..BBBBBBBBBB....',
+    '...BBBBBBBB.....',
+    '....BBBBBB......',
+    '.....BBBB.......',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+  ],
+  scribe: [
+    '................',
+    '.....CCCCCC.....',
+    '....CCCCCCCC....',
+    '...CCCPPPPCCC...',
+    '...CCCPPPPCCC...',
+    '..CCCPPPPPCCC...',
+    '..CCCPPPPPCCC...',
+    '..CCCPGGGCCC....',
+    '..CCCPGGGCCC....',
+    '..CCCPPPPPCCC...',
+    '..CCCPPPPCCC....',
+    '..CCCCCCCCCC....',
+    '...CCCCCCCC.....',
+    '....CCCCCC......',
+    '.....CCCC.......',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+  ],
+  judge: [
+    '................',
+    '.....RRRRRR.....',
+    '....RRRRRRRR....',
+    '...RRRPPPPRRR...',
+    '...RRRPPPPRRR...',
+    '..RRRPPPPPRRR...',
+    '..RRRPPPPPRRR...',
+    '..RRRGGGGRRR....',
+    '..RRRGGGGRRR....',
+    '..RRRPPPPPRRR...',
+    '..RRRPPPPRRR....',
+    '..RRRRRRRRRR....',
+    '...RRRRRRRR.....',
+    '....RRRRRR......',
+    '.....RRRR.......',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+  ],
+  blacksmith: [
+    '................',
+    '.....MMMMMM.....',
+    '....MMMMMMMM....',
+    '...MMMBBBBMMM...',
+    '...MMMBBBBMMM...',
+    '..MMMBBBBBMMM...',
+    '..MMMBBBBBMMM...',
+    '..MMMGGGGMMM....',
+    '..MMMGGGGMMM....',
+    '..MMMBBBBBMMM...',
+    '..MMMBBBBMMM....',
+    '..MMMMMMMMMM....',
+    '...MMMMMMMM.....',
+    '....MMMMMM......',
+    '.....MMMM.......',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+    '................',
+  ],
+};
+
+const PALETTES: Record<CharacterType, Record<string, string>> = {
+  king: charPalette(P.skin[3], P.gold[3], P.royal[4], P.gold[2], P.gold[4], P.crimson[3]),
+  nobility: charPalette(P.skin[2], P.crimson[3], P.royal[3], P.gold[3], P.gold[2]),
+  knight: charPalette(P.skin[2], P.dark[4], P.stone[4], P.gold[3], P.gold[2]),
+  squire: charPalette(P.skin[3], P.forest[3], P.wood[3], P.stone[3], P.gold[1]),
+  healer: charPalette(P.skin[4], P.gold[4], P.forest[4], P.wood[2], P.gold[3]),
+  sentinel: charPalette(P.skin[3], P.stone[3], P.stone[4], P.dark[4], P.gold[2]),
+  scribe: charPalette(P.skin[3], P.wood[3], P.gold[3], P.gold[2], P.royal[3]),
+  judge: charPalette(P.skin[3], P.crimson[3], P.crimson[4], P.gold[3], P.gold[2]),
+  blacksmith: charPalette(P.skin[3], P.dark[4], P.stone[4], P.gold[3], P.wood[3]),
+};
+
+function drawPixel(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, x: number, y: number, s: number, color: string) {
+  ctx.fillStyle = color;
+  ctx.fillRect(x, y, s, s);
+}
+
+function drawSprite(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, sprite: string[], palette: Record<string, string>, x: number, y: number, s: number, flipH: boolean) {
+  for (let row = 0; row < sprite.length; row++) {
+    const line = sprite[row];
+    for (let col = 0; col < line.length; col++) {
+      const key = line[col];
+      if (key === '.' || !(key in palette)) continue;
+      const px = flipH ? x + (CHAR_WIDTH - 1 - col) * s : x + col * s;
+      const py = y + row * s;
+      drawPixel(ctx, px, py, s, palette[key]);
+    }
+  }
+}
+
+export function drawCharacter(
+  ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,
+  type: CharacterType,
+  state: AnimState,
+  x: number, y: number, s: number, frame: number,
+  agentId?: string,
+  currentJob?: string | null,
+) {
+  const id = agentId ?? `${type}-${Math.round(x)}`;
+  const sprite = SPRITES[type];
+  const palette = PALETTES[type];
+  const cs = getCS(id, x, y);
+  const bob = state === 'idle' ? Math.sin(frame * 0.05) * 1.2 : state === 'working' ? Math.sin(frame * 0.1) * 0.8 : 0;
+  const drawY = cs.y + bob;
+  const flipH = cs.dir === 'left';
+
+  // Drop shadow ellipse under feet
+  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)';
+  ctx.beginPath();
+  ctx.ellipse(cs.x + CHAR_WIDTH / 2 * s, drawY + CHAR_HEIGHT * s + 2, 7 * s, 2 * s, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2);
+  ctx.fill();
+
+  // Draw pixel art sprite with outlines and shading
+  drawSprite(ctx, sprite, palette, cs.x, drawY, s, flipH);
+
+  // Walking leg overlay with subtle pixel shading
+  if (cs.moving) {
+    const lp = Math.sin(cs.wf * 0.3) * 2 * s;
+    ctx.fillStyle = palette.B;
+    ctx.fillRect(cs.x + 4 * s, drawY + (CHAR_HEIGHT - 3) * s + lp, 3 * s, 2 * s);
+    ctx.fillRect(cs.x + 9 * s, drawY + (CHAR_HEIGHT - 3) * s - lp, 3 * s, 2 * s);
+  }
+
+  drawStatusEffect(ctx, state, cs.x, drawY, s, frame);
+  if (agentId) {
+    updateBubble(id, state, currentJob ?? null, frame);
+    drawBubble(ctx, id, cs.x + CHAR_WIDTH / 2 * s, drawY - 4);
+  }
+}
+
+function drawStatusEffect(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, state: AnimState, x: number, y: number, s: number, frame: number) {
+  if (state === 'working') {
+    for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
+      const a = (frame * 0.08 + i * 2.1) % (Math.PI * 2);
+      const sx = x + CHAR_WIDTH / 2 * s + Math.cos(a) * 12 * s;
+      const sy = y + 10 * s + Math.sin(a) * 8 * s;
+      const sz = (Math.sin(frame * 0.15 + i) * 0.5 + 1) * s;
+      ctx.fillStyle = P.gold[3 + (i % 2)];
+      ctx.fillRect(sx, sy, sz, sz);
+    }
+  } else if (state === 'stalled') {
+    const pulse = Math.sin(frame * 0.12) * 0.25 + 0.25;
+    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(231, 76, 60, ${pulse})`;
+    ctx.fillRect(x - s, y - 2 * s, CHAR_WIDTH * s, CHAR_HEIGHT * s);
+    ctx.fillStyle = '#e74c3c';
+    ctx.font = `bold ${10 * s}px sans-serif`;
+    ctx.fillText('!', x + 14 * s, y + 4 * s);
+  } else if (state === 'reviewing') {
+    ctx.strokeStyle = P.gold[2]; ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
+    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(x + 16 * s, y + 2 * s, 3 * s, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.stroke();
+    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x + 18 * s, y + 4 * s); ctx.lineTo(x + 20 * s, y + 6 * s); ctx.stroke();
+  } else if (state === 'cancelled') {
+    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(50, 50, 60, 0.4)';
+    ctx.fillRect(x - s, y - 2 * s, CHAR_WIDTH * s, CHAR_HEIGHT * s);
+  }
+}
+
